analysis.consistency: High. The spell adheres to standard 5e spell formatting and mechanics for a 4th-level conjuration spell focusing on short-range teleportation.
analysis.quality: High. The description is clear, providing explicit rules for targeting (sight, visualization, distance/direction), passenger limits, and failure conditions (occupied space resulting in force damage).

mechanics.teleport_limitation: Max range 500 feet. Fails if destination is occupied.
mechanics.passenger_limit: One willing creature of size Medium or smaller, plus gear up to its carrying capacity. Passenger must be within 5 feet at casting.
